title: Evaluate vehicle bodywork for damage and identify repair requirements
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Evaluate vehicle bodywork for damage and identify repair requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Use work instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Read, interpret and comply with workplace policies, safety requirements, procedures, legal requirements, and component supplier specifications1.3 Select and check safety equipment, tooling equipment, and materials and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use work instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Read, interpret and comply with workplace policies, safety requirements, procedures, legal requirements, and component supplier specifications1.3 Select and check safety equipment, tooling equipment, and materials and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use work instructions to determine job requirements1.2 Read, interpret and comply with workplace policies, safety requirements, procedures, legal requirements, and component supplier specifications1.3 Select and check safety equipment, tooling equipment, and materials and equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Assess vehicle bodywork for damage

pcs.text: Locate vehicle to be inspected2.2 Dismantle and inspect vehicle system and components to determine vehicle damage and faults2.3 Inspect vehicle in line with workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, vehicle manufacturer and component supplier specifications, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices2.4 Determine suitability of vehicle for insurance according to workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate vehicle to be inspected2.2 Dismantle and inspect vehicle system and components to determine vehicle damage and faults2.3 Inspect vehicle in line with workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, vehicle manufacturer and component supplier specifications, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices2.4 Determine suitability of vehicle for insurance according to workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate vehicle to be inspected2.2 Dismantle and inspect vehicle system and components to determine vehicle damage and faults2.3 Inspect vehicle in line with workplace policies and procedures, legal requirements, vehicle manufacturer and component supplier specifications, safety requirements and workplace environmental practices2.4 Determine suitability of vehicle for insurance according to workplace policies and procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess vehicle bodywork for damage

elements.title: Gather vehicle data and specifications

pcs.text: Identify and document bodywork process specifications3.2 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered specifications3.3 Evaluate existing materials and equipment3.4 Compile and document vehicle data and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document bodywork process specifications3.2 Consult staff and management to identify additional or altered specifications3.3 Evaluate existing materials and equipment3.4 Compile and document vehicle data and specifications?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Gather vehicle data and specifications

elements.title: Evaluate and select materials, equipment and processes

pcs.text: Determine materials and equipment options 4.2 Assess materials and equipment for quality finish and conformity to standards4.3 Compare specifications of materials and equipment for performance and cost4.4 Determine commercial, environmental and safety impact of materials and equipment selection4.5 Select materials, equipment and processes based on performance, cost, specifications and impact comparison4.6 Document evaluation process as required by organisational policies and procedures, and legal requirements
